description.value: You have fought long enough and well enough that your reputation precedes your blade.

system.benefits:
You gain the following permanent abilities:

  • Imperious Presence: Feint attempts against you automatically fail — no roll is made.
  • Sustained Exposure: Exposed Strike now triggers on every attack against a feinted target until the start of your next turn, not just the next attack.
  • Elusive Blade: Opportunity attacks against you have Misfortune.
